name: PalWar
short_description: Welcome to "PalWar"! This is a relaxing 2D casual game that combines upgrades, card draws, synthesis, tower defense and other elements. You can summon dozens of cute pets, arrange your best defense lineup, freely customize the tower defense route, and then beat up the invading slimes!
detailed_description:
Welcome to "PalWar"!

This is a casual game that integrates upgrade, card drawing, fusion, and tower defense elements.

Upgrade

You can use gold coins to upgrade the altar, bank, and battlefield. Different buildings have different upgrade effects.

Upgrading the altar can have a higher probability of drawing high-level pets

Upgrading the bank will give you more gold coins

Upgrading the battlefield allows you to deploy more pets to kill enemies

Card drawing

Randomly summon three pets and choose the one you want. Contains dozens of pets, draw, draw! It's time to test your luck!

Fusion

Two identical pets can be synthesized into a higher-level pet with stronger combat power!

One star, two stars, three stars, evolve towards the five-star ultimate pet!

Tower defense

Completely free layout! Players can design their own tower defense routes, as well as the lineup and position of pets!

Different battlefield layouts will bring completely different effects.

A good layout allows pets to fight against hundreds of enemies and soar into the sky!

Wrong arrangement may lead to failure...

Endless Mode

Not satisfied after clearing the game? Unlock the endless mode and fight till dawn!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Indonesian, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Arabic, Korean, Ukrainian, Turkish, Greek, Polish, Thai, Swedish, Romanian, Dutch
